basic_details.job_title: CUTN Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CUTN. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUTN Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/ Organic Chemistry or an equivalent degree in the relevant subject obtained from a recognized University/institute with a minimum of 55% marks or 6.0 CGPA
qualification.details: M.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/ Organic Chemistry or an equivalent degree in the relevant subject obtained from a recognized University/institute with a minimum of 55% marks or 6.0 CGPA. Candidates having experience in catalysis in organic synthesis will be given preference.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUTN Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at CUTN?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant post at Central University of Tamil Nadu is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. Degree in Chemistry/ Organic Chemistry or an equivalent degree with at least 55% marks or 6.0 CGPA from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the type of job for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q7. Which university is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN).

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Central University of Tamil Nadu located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Tamil Nadu is located in Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 610005.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit restrictions for this position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits for this position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant.
